titleStmt.title: SII 25.164: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 164. (A.R. No. 164 of 1908.) TIRUNAṞAIYŪR, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Siddhanāthasvāmi temple.

This inscription commences with the praśasti Pūmādu-puṇara, etc., of the king. The details of the date of the record viz., year 3, Mithuṉa śu 6, Friday and Pūram regularly correspond to 4th June, 1120 A.D.

It registers the grant of lands as maḍappura-iṟaiyili to the Ādichaṇḍēśvaradēvar, the mūlabhṛityas of the deity by the mahāsabhai of Tirunaṟaiyūr alias Pañchavaṉmādēvich-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Tirunaṟaiyūrnāḍu in Kulōttuṅgaśoḻa-vaḷanāḍu which met in the temple of Siddhēśvaramuḍaiyār. The lands of araiyē-oru-mā-mukkāṇiy-araikkāṇi-mundirigai purchased from Bhaṭṭaṉ Dakshiṇāmūrti and his younger brothers of Mogili (ie., Maudgalya-gōtra) by the mahāsabhai for a value of 40 kāśu, deposited into the treasury by Pichchan Vannāyagaṉ alias Paḻandivarājar of Karuppūr in Maṇṇi-nāḍu in Virudarājabhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu were endowed as maḍappuṟa-iṟaiyili for the purpose of feeding the apūrvva-śrīmāhēśvaras who came to worship the deity Siddhēśvaram-uḍaiyār. The taxes such as peruvari, śilvari, tiruvāśalikoṇḍa-kuḍimai, were to be collected by the sabhai itself. The Śrīmāhēśvaras of the temple agreed to carry out the endowment by undertaking the lands given as iṟaiyili. A number of signatories are stated to have attested the iṟaiyili document.

It is evident from the present and the previous records both dated in the 3rd year that this year started earliest then by 4th June 1120 A.D. Therefore the accession of the king must have been on or before 4th June 1118 A.D. and not on or about the 29th June 1118 A.D. as stated by Kielhorn (see Ep. Ind., Vol. VII, pp 4-5)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
pūmātu puṇarap puvimātu vaḷara nāmātu viḷaṅka jeyamātu nilavat tantiruppatumalar manṉavar cūṭa maṉniya Urimaiyāl maṇimuṭi cūṭic ceṅkol ceṉṟu ticaitoṟum vaḷarppa veṅkali niṅki meyaṟan taḻaippa
kaliṅka miriyak kaṭamalai naṭātti valaṅkakoḷāḻivarai yāḻi naṭātti Irucuṭaraḷavum Orukuṭai niḻaṟṟa virasiṅhāsanattu mukkokkiḻā naṭikaḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecari patmarāna tribhuvanacakravarttikaḷ
śrī vikramacoḷa devarkku yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatu mituṉa nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu ṣaṣṭhiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūrattunāḷ kulottuṅka coḻavaḷanāṭṭu tirunaṟaiyūr nāṭṭut tirunaṟaiyūrākiya pañcavaṉmā
teviccaruppetimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom Iṟṟai nāḷāl Uṭaiyār siddhiśvaramuṭaiyār koyilile dharmmi ceytu kūṭṭaṅ kuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyiruntu Iṟaiyilip pramāṇam ceytu kuṭutta paricāvatu . Uṭaiyār siddhiśvara
muṭaiyāraik kumpiṭavanta Apūrvva śrīmāheśvararkku coṟiṭukaikku maṭappuṟamāka nilaṅkoṇṭu Iṟaiyili ceytu śandrādittaval kallilum cempilum veṭṭak kaṭavatāka virutarāja bhayaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu maṇṇināṭṭuk karuppūruṭaiyā
n piccan vannāyakaṉāna paḻantivarājar Itdevar śrīpaṇṭārattu Oṭukkina kācu 4 10 Ikkācu nāṟpatum Itdevar mulabhratyarākiya Āticaṇḍeśvara devar pakkale kaikkoṇṭu maṭapuṟamāka Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta nilamāvatu . Ippañcavaṉmā
teviccatuppetimaṅkalattut terpokuvitikku kiḻakku śrīrājentracoḻanvāykkālukku vaṭakku nālām kaṇṇāṟṟu mutal catirattum Iraṇṭāñcatirattum nāṅkaḷ Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta nilattukku kiḻppāṟkellai vācciyaṉ vāsudevanārāyaṇaṉuḷḷiṭṭār nilattu
kkum catirattukkum meṟkum tenpāṟkellai kārśavan śrīvāsudevan tāmotiraṉ nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai mokiliya nārāyaṇan parameśvaran brāhmaṇiperil kiṭanta nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai hārita nārāyaṇa ninṟān Uḷḷiṭṭār
peril kiṭanta nilattukku teṟkkum Āka Ivvicainta peruṉānkellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭu mokiliyan paṭṭan dakṣiṇāmurttiyum tampimārutumāy Ivarkaḷ viṟṟuk kuṭutta viḷainilam tiruvulakaḷantapaṭi nūṟukuḻi koṇṭu toru māvāka vanta In
nilam Araiye Orumā mukkāṇiyaraikkāṇi muntirikaikkum Ikkācu nāṟpatum kaikkoṇṭu Inṉilam Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttu Innilattukku vanta peruvari cilvari tiruvācalil ponta kuṭimai maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭutum nāṅkaḷe Iṟukkavum
ceyyavum kaṭavomāka Ikkoyilil muṉniṉṟa māheśvarare Innilaṅ kaikkoṇṭu Iṟaiyiliye Aṉupavittu Itdharmmam ceyyak kaṭavārkaḷākavum Ivvūril Eṅkaḷil Oruttarāl In nilattukku Aṉupava virotam varil nāṅkaḷe daṇḍamum
koṇṭu Anubhava virotam vārāmaik kākka kaṭavomākavum sabhaiyomāy Anubhavavirotam paṇṇil dharmmāsanamutalāka rājasannitippaṭṭu māheśvarañcetukoṇṭu Idharmmarakṣai paṇṇikkoḷḷak kaṭavārkaḷ
Iṟaiyili Anubhavikkap peṟuvārkaḷākavum Ipparicu kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷḷa sammatittu Ādiśvaṇḍeśvara devaṟku Iṟaiyili pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttom mahāsabhaiyom . Ipperuṅkuṟiyu ḷivvaṇṇam pontatu paṇittār vācciyan kūtta nārāyaṇa
viṇiyaṉ śrīkuṣṇan karumāṇikkapaṭṭar paṇiyālum kāśyavan nāraāyaṇaṉ kecuvapaṭṭar paṇiyālum kaviṇiyan śrīkruṣṇan civatevapaṭṭar paṇiyālum vācciyan peṇuvāramutu kūttappirān paṇiyālum kaviṇiyan śrīkuṣṇan perum puṟakkaṭal paṇiyālum moki
n poryiramuṭaiyān paṇiyālum pāratāyan tiruvāykkula muṭaiyārn tirunaṟaiyūr ninṟān paṇiyālum Ūrkkaṇakku mātānamaṅkalamuṭaiyān kiḻk kaṇakku rājādhirājavaḷa nāṭṭut tiruvintaḷūrnāṭṭu Aḻakiya coḻac caruppetimaṅkalattu maddhyastan tirucciṟṟampalamu
yen Ivai yenneḻuttu Itu vācciyan kūttanārāyaṇan sayijain=tayātanamaikku Ivai tirucciṟṟampala muṭaiyān Iruṇikkiyen Ivai yenneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven kāśyapan nārāyaṇan kecavabhaṭṭanen Ivai yenneḻut vācciyan peṇuvāramutu kūttappirānen Ivai yenneḻuttu
caṅkaranārāyaṇan(n) tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyānen Ivai Enneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kauvuśikan nārāyaṇan tiruvekampamuṭaiyānen Ivai yenneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven
mekan parameśvaranen Ippaṭi Aṟiven comittiriyan tiruvaraṅkamuṭaiyān colai Aracen Ivai Enneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven vācciyan parameśvaran citaranen Ivai Enneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven kavuṇiyan Aṇukkan yen I
vai Enneḻuttu Itu kaviṇiyaṉ śrīkuṣṇan karumāṇikkap paṭṭan sajñaiyāṉamaikku Ivai tirucciṟṟampala muṭaiyān Iruṇikkiyen Enneḻuttu IppaṭiContinuation not traceable.
Digital edition of SII 25.164 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
